story: G001 Live HQ and Performance status UX
description: Browser screenshot capture was attempted for the web surface but Chromium could not launch in this environment due missing libnspr4.so. The visual surface is represented by source-backed status badge placement and test-report evidence rather than a captured PNG.
visualDigest: The expected G001 visual surface is non-blank and contains a dark app shell with a header/topbar badge. The badge content is no longer a static Status Focus or hardcoded 성과 미기록 1건 string. Instead, HqStatusBadge renders Status 확인 중 while loading, Status 확인 실패 when the authenticated /api/hq/status payload cannot be loaded, and on success renders Status {backend status} · 성과 미기록 {needs_performance_log}건 · AI {usageRate}% · ${totalCostUsd}/${capUsd}.
